title: Migrate Development Database to PostgreSQL on AWS
description: Migrate data and tables from the existing development database to the newly created PostgreSQL database on AWS RDS.
acceptance_criteria: All tables and data are migrated to the PostgreSQL instance on AWS
Development application connects to the new PostgreSQL database
middleware_changes: Laravel database driver and .env updated from MySQL/MariaDB to PostgreSQL.
data_model_changes: Schema adapted for PostgreSQL compatibility (data types, auto-increment, etc.).
